description: VisitorsCoverage is a travel insurance marketplace and embedded-insurance platform focused on visitor, travel medical, trip, and visa-compliant coverage. It also offers Treppy, a platform for partners and AI assistants to embed travel insurance quoting and purchase flows.
summary: VisitorsCoverage publicly advertises a travel insurance HTTP API/integration platform and a Treppy MCP server, but its public docs do not expose machine-readable specs, connect/base URLs, or authentication details.
